Life at the NLR Wind Farm
⭐ 0/8
Help them get to work!
Tap on a character to get started.
Wind
Turbines
Conservation
Estate
🧠 Control Room Memory Match
Match wind farm icons!
Tap two cards to find a pair
🎉
Amazing! You matched them all!
The Control Room is the brain of the wind farm — engineers watch the screens to keep clean energy flowing to homes and schools!
🔧 Build a Wind Turbine
Drag each part to its dashed outline!
Hold and drag a piece onto the turbine
🎉
You built a wind turbine!
One wind turbine can reach up to 130 meters – even taller than large buildings or Chocolate Hills! When the wind blows, the blades spin to make clean electricity.
🌳 Tree Species Matching
Tap a tree, then tap its name!
Connect each tree to the correct species
🎉
You know your Philippine trees!
Foresters at NLR plant native trees like these to keep the forest healthy for wildlife — and for all of us!
🔍 Conservation Estate
Northern-rufous Hornbill
Find the Northern-rufous Hornbill!
Tap the birds — look for the big colorful bill!
🎉
You found the Northern-rufous Hornbill!
You can find this bird in the forest area of the NLR wind farm. Foresters like Liza protect its home!
Amazing Explorer!
You finished all 8 missions — you are now a Certified NLR Explorer! Here’s your special badge. 📸 Take a photo to remember this moment!
⛅
☁️
Hi! I'm Mappy, your guide! 🗺️
Meet the crew who keep the North Luzon Renewables (NLR) wind farm running! Help each character reach their workstation and finish their special mission!
What's your name, explorer? 🍃

Please turn your device sideways!
The wind farm is wide — landscape shows the whole map.
